title: Register Waypoint as a referenced app concept
approval_evidence: Waypoint es una app, aun no se desarrolla. Solo hay discusiones sobre el enfoque. Apruebo DEC-LAB-007 y DEC-LAB-008.

decision.summary: Register Waypoint in the LAB project registry as a referenced app concept whose current material records strategic discussion only. Waypoint has not entered development and this registration creates no product-execution authority.
rules: Waypoint is an application concept under discussion, not a developed or operational product.
Its existing project-state files are continuity records for product framing, MVP hypotheses, risks, and validation questions.
The project registry status is referenced, using the existing controlled registry vocabulary.
The internal document status REFERENCED_CONCEPT may remain descriptive inside the Waypoint state record and does not extend the registry status vocabulary.

Statements marked APPROVED_FOR_STRATEGY represent approved discussion direction only; they do not authorize implementation, coding, repository creation, research execution, commercial validation, release, integration, deployment, or product change.
Any development, validation activity, repository write outside LAB, or product execution requires a separate explicit bounded authorization.
